title: Why NIGHT Went Up Yesterday
summary: Midnight was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 35.0% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 35.0% move.
Roughly $96M in 24-hour trading volume suggests active short-term participation.
The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
